name: after-effects-mcp

name: Agent Browser
description: A fast Rust-based headless browser automation CLI with Node.js fallback that enables AI agents to navigate, click, type, and snapshot pages via structured commands.
bodySummary: 1. Navigate: `agent-browser open <url>` 2. Snapshot: `agent-browser snapshot -i` (returns elements with refs like `@e1`, `@e2`) 3. Interact using refs from the snapshot 4. Re-snapshot after navigation or significant DOM

name: agent-cli
description: Comprehensive local agent-CLI playbook for choosing and using OpenCode (`opencode`), Harness (`harness`), and Codex CLI (`codex`). Use when Codex needs to route a task to the right local coding-agent CLI, run CLI agents from PowerShell, compare capabilities, use browser/multi-model workflows, manage sessions, review code, attach skill/rule files, create OpenCode native agents, inspect model/provider state, configure safety modes, or explain reliable agent-CLI command patterns.
bodySummary: Use this skill as the unified operating guide for the three local coding-agent CLIs available on this machine:

name: agent-workflow
description: Agent workflow framework for building and operating long-lived, step-based workflows on top of `mycli agent-cli`. Use when the task involves `workflow.json`, step scaffolding, listener/webhook waiting, review gates, run status inspection, event injection, or controlled multi-step agent orchestration under D:\\agent_workspace\\capability-library\\agent-system-rules\\agent-workflow.
bodySummary: Use this capability when the task should be modeled as a workflow rather than a single agent invocation.

name: bilibili-all-in-one
description: A comprehensive Bilibili toolkit that integrates hot trending monitoring, video downloading, video watching/playback, subtitle downloading, and video publishing capabilities into a single unified skill. Supports Bilibili session cookie authentication for publishing and high-quality downloads. Requests go to official Bilibili API endpoints and YouTube oEmbed API (for YouTube stats) over HTTPS.
bodySummary: A comprehensive Bilibili toolkit that integrates hot trending monitoring, video downloading, video watching/playback, subtitle downloading, and video publishing capabilities into a single unified skill.

name: cinematic-storyboard-generator
description: Generate professional, cinema-grade storyboard prompts for AI image/video generation platforms (LibTV/LibLib, 即梦, Seedance, Kling, etc.). Use when creating shot-by-shot visual prompts for short dramas, films, promotional videos, or any cinematic content. Triggers on: 写分镜, 生成分镜, 分镜提示词, storyboard, shot list, 镜头设计, 影视级提示词, 短剧分镜, AI生图提示词, AI视频提示词. Includes: seven essential elements framework, four iron rules (asset anchoring, light logic, material consistency, spatial coherence), quality checklist, scene-type-specific guidance (ancient/fantasy, modern, overseas formats), shot type reference, and transition words. Built from professional film cinematography standards — not generic prompt templates, but cinema-level methodology.
bodySummary: Generate professional, cinema-grade image prompts for AI generation platforms (LibTV/LibLib, 即梦, Seedance, etc.).

name: self-improvement
description: Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Use when: (1) A command or operation fails unexpectedly, (2) User corrects Claude ('No, that's wrong...', 'Actually...'), (3) User requests a capability that doesn't exist, (4) An external API or tool fails, (5) Claude realizes its knowledge is outdated or incorrect, (6) A better approach is discovered for a recurring task. Also review learnings before major tasks.
bodySummary: Log learnings and errors to markdown files for continuous improvement. Coding agents can later process these into fixes, and important learnings get promoted to project memory.

name: video-script-generator
description: 生成短视频脚本和分镜。输入产品/主题描述、目标受众、时长，输出完整脚本+分镜结构（JSON/YAML）。支持多种模板：痛点-解决、反转剧情、before-after。触发词：视频脚本、短视频文案、分镜、storyboard、video script。
bodySummary: 1. 收集输入信息 2. 选择模板风格 3. 生成脚本+分镜结构 4. 输出结构化数据供下游消费

name: video-script-writer
description: 短视频脚本生成专家，面向抖音、B站、YouTube、小红书、视频号内容创作者，快速生成爆款脚本和文案。触发场景：用户提到"写脚本"、"短视频脚本"、"抖音文案"、"B站脚本"、"视频选题"、"直播话术"、"爆款标题"、"小红书笔记"、"视频号脚本"、"YouTube脚本"、"口播稿"、"分镜脚本"、"带货话术"、"内容创作"、"帮我写一个视频"、"开场白"、"钩子"、"封面文案"、"话题标签"等关键词时激活。支持知识科普、情感故事、产品测评、带货直播等多种内容类型。
bodySummary: 1. **爆款选题生成**：根据关键词、行业、目标受众生成高互动潜力选题 2. **完整视频脚本**：开场钩子 → 内容展开 → 结尾CTA 完整结构 3. **口播稿**：自然口语化，含停顿标注、语气词、节奏控制 4. **分镜脚本**：含画面描述、字幕文案、BGM建议、转场方式 5. **标题和封面**：多版本爆款标题 + 封面文案 + 话题标签 6. **多平台适配**：自动调整风格、时长、格式匹配目标平台

name: whisper-local-stt
description: 使用本地 Whisper（faster-whisper）将音频/视频转文字，支持中英文、时间戳输出、JSON/TXT/SRT 导出；并可基于转写文本生成多长度摘要（short/medium/long）。用户提到“语音转文字/视频转写/字幕生成/whisper/asr/stt/transcribe/转写后总结”时使用。适用于离线优先、避免依赖外部转写 API 的场景。
bodySummary: 本 skill **自包含可运行**，不依赖其他项目目录。

name: windows-shortcut-registration-skill

bodySummary: 本技能用于把“快捷打开某个工具 / 进入某个目录 / 执行某个命令 / 持久化热键方案”整理成稳定、可复用、可排查的本机自动化流程。

name: workflow_engine
description: OpenClaw 可读取的工作流引擎说明文档，定义 workflow.json、节点结构、参数传播、项目生成、运行、断点续跑，以及在项目 action 函数中通过 scripts.llm 调用大模型的方式。
bodySummary: `workflow_engine` 是一个基于 `workflow.json` 驱动的轻量工作流引擎。
